sources.name: HMRC Bulk Imports — plastics & polymers (HS 39)
sources.note: Monthly per-origin UK polymer and plastics imports across HS chapter 39.

sources.name: UK polymer industry self-sufficiency
sources.note: UK petrochemical and plastics industry covers ~40-50% of total polymer demand. Used to derive monthly £ production via SS/(1-SS) × net imports.

sources.name: Voeten — UN General Assembly Voting Data
sources.note: Used to classify each trade partner into an alignment bucket.

monthly.description: Monthly UK polymer imports (HS 39: resins + downstream products) by alignment, plus an estimated UK petrochemical production component (SS=45%).

byPartner.description: Per-partner totals across the 24-month window; sorted by total imports descending.
